pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + SLOT + Brotli — 1.1088 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels, widens the MLP to 3.5×, and uses Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 plus Brotli to stay under budget.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels with precomputed activation gradient
Hessian-trace mixed int5/int6 quantization to free capacity for 3.5× hidden dim
Brotli-11 compression with memmap multi-shard GPU-prefetch pipeline
